title: British Potatoes with Mustardy Gooey Sauce
description: A delicious side dish combining boiled potatoes with a creamy, mustard-flavored sauce.
instructions: 1. Boil the potatoes in a large pot of salted water for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
2. Drain the potatoes and let them cool slightly.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt the gooey over low heat.
4. Add the mustardy to the saucepan and whisk until well combined.
5. Add the hot pot to the saucepan and stir for 1-2 minutes.
6. Add the boiled potatoes to the saucepan and toss to coat with the mustardy gooey sauce.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
